test_effectiveRewardGrowth_capsAtReserve.details: Warp past periodFinish to verify reward doesn't exceed reserve

test_effectiveRewardGrowth_geStoredGrowt.details: The effective growth includes pending rewards since lastUpdated

test_estimatePendingReward_proportionalT.details: Uses vm.warp to simulate time passing and checks reward proportionality

test_pendingReward_consistentWithRewardR.details: Pending rewards from warp should approximately equal rewardRate * duration / stakedLiquidity * position_liquidity

test_calculateRewardAPR_livePool().notice: Test _calculateRewardAPR returns realistic values on live pool

test_calculateRewardAPR_zeroLiquidityVal.notice: Test _calculateRewardAPR returns 0 for zero liquidity value

test_calculateRewardRateForRange_inRange.notice: Test _calculateRewardRateForRange returns non-zero for in-range position

test_calculateRewardRateForRange_outOfRa.notice: Test _calculateRewardRateForRange returns zero for out-of-range position

test_effectiveRewardGrowth_capsAtReserve.notice: Test that effective growth caps at reward reserve

test_effectiveRewardGrowth_geStoredGrowt.notice: Test that effective reward growth >= stored reward growth on live pool

test_effectiveRewardGrowth_increasesWith.notice: Test that effective reward growth increases with time (vm.warp)

test_getPoolRewardState_readsLiveState().notice: Test that _getPoolRewardState reads real pool state correctly

test_getRewardGrowthInside_livePool().notice: Test _getRewardGrowthInside on a real pool with known tick range

test_getRewardPeriodRemaining_livePool().notice: Test _getRewardPeriodRemaining returns non-zero for active pool

test_isRewardActive_livePool().notice: Test _isRewardActive on a pool with active rewards

test_logAllPoolRewardStates().notice: Log reward state for all well-known pools (diagnostic, always passes)

test_pendingReward_consistentWithRewardR.notice: Verify that pending reward estimation is consistent with reward rate

uniswapV3SwapCallback(int256,int256,byte.notice: Slipstream swap callback - pay the pool for the swap
